'''Wyndigal 2''', originally known as '''Huronom''',<ref name="Xim">{{SW|url=news/essential-atlas-extra-the-history-of-xim-and-the-tion-cluster|text=Essential Atlas Extra: The History of Xim and the Tion Cluster|int=Xim Week: The History of Xim and the Tion Cluster}}</ref> was a swampy [[Planet/Legends|planet]] located within the [[Wyndigal system/Legends|Wyndigal system]] in the [[Ash Worlds/Legends|Ash Worlds]] in the [[Outer Rim Territories/Legends|Outer Rim Territories]].<ref name="Atlas" />

Once a prominent world of the [[Ash Worlds/Legends|Kiirium Reaches]], Huronom was conquered by [[Xim/Legends|Xim the Despot]] during [[Xim's empire|his empire's]] [[Xim's Expansionist Period|Expansionist Period]], and became known as the Seventh Throne of Xim. After Xim's defeat at the [[Third Battle of Vontor]] and the subsequent [[The Devouring|devastation]] of the Kiirium Reaches by the [[Hutt Empire]], Huronom lost its importance and its identity as the Seventh Throne was forgotten. It was not until the time of the [[Galactic Empire/Legends|Galactic Empire]] that Wyndigal 2's former identity as Huronom was rediscovered by [[Bleys Harand]] and [[Henrietya Antilles]].<ref name="Xim" />

Wyndigal 2's [[Star/Legends|star]] emitted intense [[Ultraviolet/Legends|ultraviolet]] [[Radiation/Legends|radiation]]. It was home to such [[Water/Legends|aquatic]] animal [[Species/Legends|species]] as the [[croator]] and the [[Nyantolo (creature)|nyantolo]], the latter of which was named for [[Nyantolo]], a [[Rodian/Legends|Rodian]] [[Scout/Legends|scout]] who was part of an early expedition to the planet.<ref name="Creatures" />
